notes: These ranges are reserved for World Master-owned content slots and dummy placeholders.
They are not a claim that all rows already exist in the server DB.
Use these ranges when pre-seeding dummy entries that WM can later repurpose or rewrite.

quest_template.purpose: WM private quest arcs, branch quests, and follow-up quests

item_template.purpose: WM private reward items, equipped-gate items, and item prototypes

spell_dbc_or_spell_slots.purpose: WM private spell reward slots, wrapper spells, and alternate ability variants

gossip_menu.purpose: WM-authored conversation nodes and branching menus
